rationale: Substantial CI/CD refactor PR. New .github/scripts/module-map.sh centralizes MODULOS_CANONICOS, MODULOS_ESPECIALES, and module_singular/module_validator/module_ejemplo/module_plantilla/module_is_special functions that eliminate the long if/elif duplication previously in three workflows. New .github/actions/setup-validadores/action.yml is a composite action wrapping actions/setup-python@v5 + pip cache + pyyaml install. ci-global.yml correctly fixes the subshell-loses-EXIT bug by converting `find | while ...` to `while ... done < <(find ...)` process substitution so `exit $EXIT` actually propagates the failure. The final summary job moves needs[*].result into env: vars (R_YAML, R_JSON, etc.) instead of bash variable interpolation. pr-guardian.yml sanitizes the PR title via env: PR_TITLE (anti-injection), adds fetch-depth: 0, and adds CHANGELOG.md to a protected list with an exception when module directories are also changed. validar-todos.yml replaces matrix-generation if/elif chains with `source module-map.sh` calls, and the jq output switches from `jq -s .` to `jq -sc .` for single-line JSON in $GITHUB_OUTPUT. security-scan.yml drops `fetch-depth: 0` from the detect-secrets job (kept on trufflehog where it's required) and pins trufflesecurity/trufflehog from @main to @v3.88.29. Real refactor with consistent intent, not a cheat.
